title: Where's My Wither Skeleton Skull (WMWSS)
description: Increases the chance of a Wither Skeleton Skull dropping to 25% (Vanilla percentage is 2.5%)
body:
The regular drop percentage of a Wither Skeleton Skull dropping from a Wither Skeleton is 2.5%. This mod increases that percentage to 25%, making it a 1 in 4 chance of obtaining a Wither Skeleton Skull from each kill!
 

If you like this mod, consider checking out some of my other projects!
